sources.label: Yahoo Finance - LNN news page (checked for post-Jun-6 items; latest material items are April Q2 miss / MENA project coverage)
StockTitan LNN news feed (Q3 FY26 earnings call scheduling; no new releases Jun 6-9)
MarketBeat LNN earnings page (next report timing; Stifel Hold, PT cut to $113 dated Jun 2 - pre-window)

verdicts.rankRationale: No material news in the Jun 6-9 window and the stock is flat today (+0.33%); the latent-node thesis (irrigation telemetry, remote monitoring, water-efficiency know-how) is unchanged from yesterday's hold, so rank 1 stands. YTD -6.35% means there is no rerating chase to penalize on this list.
verdicts.bull: Pivot/FieldNET telemetry and water-efficiency systems give Lindsay scarce-water site-management know-how that is unpriced as an AI-infrastructure adjacency; at $1.17B cap and negative YTD the name is uncrowded with cheap optionality into the late-June Q3 print.
verdicts.neutral: Core thesis is latent, not earning: revenue is driven by ag-irrigation cycles and the MENA project, not AI demand, so the stock drifts with farm income and rates until the water/data-center angle gets concrete validation.
verdicts.bear: The April Q2 miss (EPS $1.15 vs $1.60 est, revenue -16% y/y) and Stifel's Jun 2 PT cut to $113 show fundamentals deteriorating; if Q3 in late June disappoints again, the latent-AI optionality is swamped by a weak ag capex cycle.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Fiscal Q3 2026 earnings expected late June / early July, including MENA project shipment progress and any FieldNET/telemetry commercialization detail.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Continued domestic irrigation weakness and MENA execution/geopolitical risk producing another miss, with no AI-relevant validation to offset it.
